title: U.S. Moves to Deport Son of Prominent Figure in Iranian Revolution
summary_full: Federal agents arrested a man whose mother served as a spokeswoman for the Islamist embassy captors during the hostage crisis that began in 1979.
summary_public: Federal agents arrested a man whose mother served as a spokeswoman for the Islamist embassy captors during the hostage crisis that began in 1979.
